rationale: Rebuilt det.rs as a standalone file: added minimal supporting types (Ordering, KeyTrait, VerusClone, AbstractEndPoint, EndPoint/ID, KeyIterator, DelegationMap). Modeled DelegationMap with a single public field m: Map<K, AbstractEndPoint> and #[verifier::ext_equal] so struct equality reduces to Map equality. Defined valid() = (dom() =~= Set::full()) so domain coverage is automatic. The proof block guards on the implication's antecedent, then proves pointwise key equality by instantiating both forall-ki ensures with ki = KeyIterator { k: Some(k) } (case-split on between(lo, ki, hi); the if/else makes the trigger fire in both branches), then lifts via Map =~= extensionality, then via DelegationMap =~= extensionality. r1 == r2 is trivial for unit. Two earlier iterations fixed (1) missing #[verifier::reject_recursive_types(K)] on DelegationMap and (2) loop-without-decreases in the unreachable arm of exec get; collapsed exec get into a spec fn directly. verus exits 0 with 1 verified, 0 error
